items.title: The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.

But at face value, without further moves, it's indefensible.
